channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: National Debt and Future Generations
item.description: Short-term political considerations may overshadow long-term economic stability concerns for U.S. lawmakers.

item.title: Florida Teachers' Union Lawsuit Challenges School Choice
item.description: The Florida Education Association’s legal action raises questions about its commitment to educational opportunity.

item.title: Judge Lagoa on SCOTUS and Birthright Citizenship
item.description: An analysis of how Justice Lagoa might have ruled on recent Supreme Court cases.

item.title: Hegseth to face congressional questioning on Iran and related matters
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is scheduled to answer questions from Congress Tuesday, including concerns about the Iran conflict.
